episodes.title: She Exposed a Hidden Cult in America — Now Her Films Are Rescuing Survivors | Diana Davis
episodes.description:
What is really happening inside some of America’s most secretive cult communities?
In this powerful episode of Vision & Voice, we speak with filmmaker and activist Diana Davis, founder of the nonprofit MoviesMakingaDifference.
Diana has spent years exposing the hidden world of human trafficking, child labor, and forced marriages connected to fundamentalist cults like the FLDS. Through her films Cathedral Canyon, Cult Cartel, and the upcoming Carmelita, she raises awareness and helps real survivors rebuild their lives.
Her nonprofit has already helped over 300 survivors escape exploitation and start new lives.
In this episode we discuss:

• The truth about the FLDS cult and Warren Jeffs
• How children are raised in isolation from the outside world
• The connection between cults, organized crime, and trafficking
• Diana’s films exposing these realities
• How Movies Making a Difference is helping survivors escape and rebuild
  These stories are difficult—but they need to be heard.

🎬 Learn more about Diana’s films and support the mission:

👉 Movies Making a Difference
If you want to support awareness about human trafficking and modern slavery, please share this episode. 
https://moviesmakingadifference.com
